info.title: Personal information
info.description: The personal information route has been changed to /info. Detailed account content can be added when the matching API is available.
info.changePasswordDescription: Update your sign-in password to keep your account protected.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.description: Enter your current password and create a stronger new password for your AI interview practice account.
changePassword.securityNote: Your password is updated through a secure server request. Use a password that is not reused on other services.

messages.invalid: Please check the fields and password requirements.
messages.mismatch: The confirmation password does not match the new password.
messages.error: Could not update password. Please try again.

manage.title: Manage profile
manage.description: Create and update job profiles so the AI can use the right skills, experience, and projects during interview practice.

list.title: Profile list
list.empty: No profiles yet. Create your first profile to get started.

messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this profile?

deleteDialog.title: Delete profile?
deleteDialog.description: This profile will be removed from your list. This action cannot be undone.

activities.title: Activities
activities.description: Your activity history, logins, and other security events will be displayed here.
activities.emptyDescription: Your recent activities will appear here.

general.title: General Settings
general.description: Manage general settings for your interface and account.
